VOLUME [C:\data\db C:\data\configdb]
# Wed, 22 Jan 2025 20:37:22 GMT
EXPOSE 27017
# Wed, 22 Jan 2025 20:37:23 GMT
CMD ["mongod" "--bind_ip_all"]
